chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6070 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.25705/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 21.03.2025 Mr.Imran Iqbal, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the Respondent. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, pursuant to order of this Court, the assessment subject matter herein has been treated as provisional. Learned counsel seeks that the assessment be finalized after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent Department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
